subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have commanded all to manifest praiseworthy conduct and that which hath been enjoined in the Book. We desire for them naught save that which shall preserve them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا امرنا لکل بالأخلاق المرضیة و ما امروا به فی الکتاب انا ما اردنا لهم الا ما یحفظهم
